violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Ice scoop laying in ice.
General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Shelf in refrigerator is retro-fitted wood.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Residue at catch tray used at auto fry.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Grease at counter below auto fry. -Ketchup at edges of refrigerator. -Residue at bottom edge of refrigerator. -Rust at interior bottom glass door cooler.
